diff:
diff --git a/src/http_headers.py b/src/http_headers.py
index 65417cd..76e4e3e 100644
--- a/src/http_headers.py
+++ b/src/http_headers.py
@@ -1,6 +1,12 @@
 def build_headers(token, extra=None):
-    extra = extra or {}
-    extra.setdefault("Accept", "application/json")
+    # Create a new mapping to avoid mutating the input
+    headers = dict(extra) if extra else {}
+
+    # Ensure the Accept header is set to application/json
+    headers.setdefault("Accept", "application/json")
+
+    # Add the Authorization header with Bearer format if a token is provided
     if token:
-        extra["Authorization"] = token
-    return extra
+        headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"
+
+    return headers
